content: agent1: implementing 'domain' parameter support for {% trans %} tag in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse/_make_node/_install_callables). Will touch src/jinja2/ext.py only. Will ping before finishing.

agent1: my domain feature is done in ext.py. Summary: added 'domain: t.Optional[nodes.Expr] = None' local in parse(), intercepted token.value=='domain' inside the existing assign-branch (validates Const str, dup-check raises TemplateAssertionError), passed 'domain' as new trailing positional arg to self._make_node(...). _make_node() gained trailing 'domain: t.Optional[nodes.Expr] = None' param, used to switch gettext/ngettext calls to dgettext/dngettext with domain prepended to args. Also added dgettext/dngettext plumbing in _install/_install_callables/_uninstall + new-style wrapper helpers _make_new_dgettext/_make_new_dngettext and fallback helpers when translations lack real domain support. FYI I don't see your metadata changes in my copy of ext.py — looks like we may be in separate workspace copies, so no clobbering on my end. Good luck!
